chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P. No.S-271 of 2025. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 29.08.2025 M/s Zafar Ali Malgani and Arif Hussain Panhwar, advocates for the petitioners. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Asstt. A. G. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G. SIP Dilshad Ahmed Mangi of PS Dokri, SIP Ali Dost on behalf of SSP Larkana, SIP Zulfiqar Ali on behalf of SSP Kamber, SIP Altaf Hussain Gorari SHO PS Shah Godrio, SIP Muharram Ali Solangi of PS A- Section Mehar, SIP Khalid Ali Sodhar of PS Fareedabad and Inspector Naeem Akhtar Abro SHO PS Naseerabad are present -.-.-.-.-.- Statements filed on behalf of official respondents No.2, 3, 4, 5 & 10, taken on record, copies of same have been provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. Official respondents have stated in their statements/comments that they had never harassed the petitioner and their family member nor they intend to do so in future. Learned Asstt. A. G Sindh and learned Addl. P. G submitted that official respondents are legally bound to provide legal protection to all the citizens including the petitioners without any discrimination. They after going through the record, ensure that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection of life, honour and property to the petitioners and their family in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. Learned counsel for the petitioners being satisfied with the statements made by learned Asstt. A. G and learned Addl. P. G sought disposal of instant petition with direction to the official respondents to provide necessary protection to the petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment.

P. G sought disposal of instant petition with direction to the official respondents to provide necessary protection to the petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. In view of whatever discussed above, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide necessary legal protection of life, liberty, honour and property to the petitioners and their family members in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. Let copy of this order be provided to learned Asstt. A. G, learned Addl. P. G and copy of the same shall also be communicated to SSP Larkana, SSP Dadu & SSP Kamber over fax for compliance. Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
